# Content

Command Query Responsibility Segregation.

Seperates the logic that handles commands from the logic that handles queries.

Often used in event driven apps

In traditional apps the same data model is used to query and update, but this can become slow and unwieldy in large apps.

CQRS uses commands to update date (task based) and queries to read data (that never change the db)

![](data:image/png;base64,)
